g.text: Flow CTR-01: View Runway Slot Timetable
Verify controller is in RunwayScheduleDB.accessible set
[SQL] SELECT * FROM runways WHERE id = runwayId
[SQL] SELECT * FROM slots WHERE runway_id = runwayId
[SQL] SELECT * FROM cached_flights WHERE flight_id IN flightIds
return ScheduleView with warning("Using cached data - API unavailable")
Each slot includes flightId, scheduledTime, status, updatedTime, emergencyFlag
return ScheduleView with warning("Response time exceeded")
[SQL] SELECT * FROM slots WHERE id = slotId
[SQL] SELECT operating_hours FROM runways WHERE id = runwayId
[SQL] UPDATE slots SET status='delayed', updated_time=newScheduledTime WHERE id=slotId
raiseAlert("New time exceeds runway operating hours")
return Slot with alert("Time exceeds operating hours")
[SQL] UPDATE slots SET status='delayed', updated_time=newScheduledTime WHERE id=slotId
addEmergencySlot(flightId: String, runwayId: String, scheduledTime: DateTime) : Slot
return Error("Insufficient permissions for emergency operation")
[SQL] SELECT * FROM runways WHERE id = runwayId
[SQL] SELECT operating_hours FROM runways WHERE id = runwayId
return Error("Cannot schedule outside operating hours")
No state change - edge case safety constraint
[SQL] INSERT INTO slots (flight_id, scheduled_time, status, emergency_flag) VALUES (...)
Notify all controllers viewing any runway
[SQL] UPDATE slots SET ... WHERE id=slotId AND version=currentVersion
return Error("Concurrent modification detected, please retry")
